title: Provision framework_development advisor (template=quality-advisor)
justification: Project contains WAI framework protocols and teaching infrastructure; requires dedicated oversight of architecture, history/evolution, and expedition/timeline management
perceive: Provision a new 'framework_development' advisor for this spoke. Ozi team-coverage eval identified this as the highest-priority gap. Justification: Project contains WAI framework protocols and teaching infrastructure; requires dedicated oversight of architecture, history/evolution, and expedition/timeline management Hub templates: {hub_path}/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/. Roster: WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json. Pattern to follow: WAI-Spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.
execute: 2. Read WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json. Reuse a 'new'/'stub' advisor_id in department_id=quality if one fits, else assign advisor_id='framework_development'.

4. Write WAI-Spoke/advisors/<advisor_id>/context_prompt.md — adapt the quality-advisor charter for domain=framework_development: set advisor_id, domain, mission statement, responsibilities (3-5 bullet points), escalation-to-Ozi rule. Model on WAI-Spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.

6. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json: add/update entry with status=stub, department_id=quality, domain=framework_development, initialized_from_template=quality-advisor. Preserve all other entries.
7. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json: if advisor_id absent, append entry with run_cadence=weekly, event_triggers=[], last_run_at=null, next_recommended_run=null.
8. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/ozi/scan_state.json: set team_coverage.gaps_detected entry for domain=framework_development to proposal_status=provisioned.
verify: WAI-Spoke/advisors/<advisor_id>/context_prompt.md exists with domain=framework_development; scan_state.json initialized; registry.json entry status=stub; schedule-index.json has weekly entry; Ozi scan_state gap[domain=framework_development].proposal_status == 'provisioned'.
acceptance_criteria: schedule-index.json has weekly entry for advisor
